name: octopus
description: Five-agent orchestration OS for Claude Code. Research, design, build, verify, and ship with typed handoffs, a cold verifier, and gate primitives for irreversible actions.
author: Victor del Rosal / fiveinnolabs

no_hijack_guarantee.note: This plugin adds capability only. It does not seize the session. Safe to remove completely: rm -rf ~/.claude/plugins/octopus. No residual side effects.

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Intelligence gathering and evaluation. Scout mode (forward) and Evaluate mode (backward). Never builds or publishes.

agents.name: designer
agents.description: Creates design specs, architectures, and experience flows from research briefs. Never writes production code.

agents.name: maker
agents.description: Builds, tests, and prepares deployments from design specs. All deploy actions go through gate().

agents.name: marketer
agents.description: Produces distribution drafts: copy, landing pages, email sequences, social posts. Never publishes autonomously.

agents.name: manager
agents.description: Orchestrator. Decomposes tasks, dispatches agents, enforces quality gates, synthesizes results. Does not do specialist work.

agents.name: verifier
agents.description: Cold independent verifier. Fresh context each round. Read-only. Grades pipeline exit with no access to builder reasoning.

commands.name: research
commands.description: Spawn Yellow Researcher in Scout mode. Gathers intelligence on a niche or topic.

commands.name: evaluate
commands.description: Spawn Yellow Analyst in Evaluate mode. Analyses live product metrics and recommends KILL / PIVOT / SCALE.

commands.name: design
commands.description: Spawn Red-Orange Designer. Produces a design spec from a brief or research handoff.

commands.name: build
commands.description: Spawn Blue Maker. Builds, tests, and prepares deployment from a design spec.

commands.name: market
commands.description: Spawn Green Marketer. Produces distribution drafts (copy, email, social posts) for human review.

commands.name: sprint
commands.description: Full sequential pipeline: research then design then build then verify then market. Uses the sprint workflow.

commands.name: team
commands.description: Parallel fan-out: dispatch independent tasks to multiple agents simultaneously, then synthesize.

commands.name: review
commands.description: Adversarial review loop: builder revises until a cold verifier passes or budget is exhausted.

commands.name: cycle
commands.description: Foundry venture commands. Requires the foundry skill to be enabled.

subcommands.name: hunt
subcommands.description: Discover and launch a new MICRO_TOOL candidate.

subcommands.name: harvest
subcommands.description: Compound a winning product: SEO expansion, conversion optimization, variants.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Portfolio dashboard across all active products.

workflows.name: sprint
workflows.description: Full sequential pipeline: research to design to build to verify to market.

criteria.description: User-defined acceptance criteria to append to the frozen set

context.description: Additional context injected into agent prompts

workflows.name: team
workflows.description: Parallel fan-out: dispatch independent tasks simultaneously, then synthesize.

tasks.description: Array of task objects: { id, type, description, context }

goal.description: Overarching team goal for synthesis context

workflows.name: review
workflows.description: Adversarial review loop: builder revises until cold verifier passes or budget exhausted.

criteria.description: Binary acceptance criteria, frozen at loop start

agentType.description: Builder agent type: maker, designer, or marketer

skills.name: foundry
skills.description: Paid venture vertical. Discover, build, price, and ship single-page micro-tools for passive income. Includes cycle hunt, cycle harvest, cycle status.

mcp_connectors.name: cloudflare-pages
mcp_connectors.purpose: Deploy build artifacts to Cloudflare Pages. Prepare and execute deploys only after gate() approves the deploy action.
mcp_connectors.note: Required for Foundry (cycle hunt build stage). Optional for base plugin sprint/build commands.

mcp_connectors.name: stripe
mcp_connectors.purpose: Create and update products and prices. No charge execution. No subscription creation without gate() approval.
mcp_connectors.note: Used in Foundry for product creation. Charges and subscriptions are permanently gated.

gate_config.note: These action types cannot be bypassed by any agent instruction or config flag. Distribution actions are permanently gated: Octopus drafts, a human sends.

mandatory_security_checks: SECRET_SCAN: scan all staged files for API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, .env contents
DEPENDENCY_AUDIT: check package.json, requirements.txt, go.mod for high and critical CVEs
verify_config.note: Security checks run before any user-defined criteria. A single finding fails the entire pipeline. Both checks are mandatory and cannot be disabled.
